39→ """Validation completed (may have passed or failed checks). 44→ failed_count: Number of failed checks 45→ graph: Dependency graph of roadmap nodes (empty if parsing failed) 48→ validation_errors: Parser-level warnings from roadmap parsing

105:def validate_objective( 106- remote: RemoteGitHub, 107- *, 108- owner: str, 109- repo: str, 110- issue_number: int, 111-) -> ObjectiveValidationResult: 112- """Validate an objective programmatically. 113- 114- Checks: 115- 1. Issue exists and has erk-objective label 116- 2. Roadmap parses successfully (v2 format required) 117- 3. Status/PR consistency (done steps should have PRs) 118- 4. No orphaned statuses (done without PR reference) 119- 5. Phase numbering is sequential 120- 6. v2 format integrity (objective-header has objective_comment_id) 121- 7. Plan/PR references use # prefix 122- 8. Roadmap table sync (rendered table matches YAML source) 123- 124- This function does not produce output or raise SystemExit. 125-
